title: Slice Dependency Graph
description: Schema for representing the directed dependency graph between mirror slices.

graph_id.description: Unique identifier for this dependency graph.

mirror_id.description: Identifier of the mirror this graph describes.

nodes.description: List of slice IDs that form the nodes of the graph.

additionalProperties.description: List of slice IDs this node depends on.

edges.description: Adjacency list: each key is a slice ID mapping to its dependency list.

declared_boundaries.description: Slice IDs that mark trust boundaries in the graph.
